pillarMessages.message: The house edge on blackjack is 0.5%. On slots, it's 2–15%. On American roulette, it's 5.26%. Now you know.
Every game has a house edge. It's how the business works. Knowing the edge helps you pick your games and set your budget.
No fine print. Just the real numbers behind the games you play.
The odds are public information. We just make them interesting.
Share this with the friend who thinks they have a 'system.'
pillarMessages.context: Social media hook, quiz share prompt

pillarMessages.message: The best players know the game. Now you can too.
How well do you really know the odds? There's one way to find out.
Facts worth sharing. Knowledge worth having.
Deposit limits take 10 seconds to set. It's like a seatbelt for your bankroll — you set it once and it works in the background.
Your tools. Your limits. Your call.
Set your budget before you play. It's the one decision that makes every other decision easier.
Play stats, session history, spending patterns — it's all in your dashboard. No surprises.
Free, confidential support — for any question about gambling. No judgment. Ever.
You can pause your account for as long as you need. Here's how.
Support is one tap away. Whenever you're ready.

contextualMessages.message: Setting a deposit limit? Smart move. Pick your number and play without second-guessing.
Think of this as your entertainment budget for the week. You pick the number.
Your deposit limit is set. Adjust it anytime in settings.
You've hit your deposit limit for this period. It resets {{RESET_DATE}}. That's you playing on your own terms.
You've been playing for {{DURATION}}. Most sessions average about 45 minutes. Keep going or take a break?
Quick check-in: you've been at it for {{DURATION}}. How's it going?
Time flies when you're playing. That's by design. Here's your session update.
Session update: {{DURATION}} so far. Want to set a reminder for next time?
Your play stats are ready. See where your money goes — no surprises.
Here's your activity summary for {{PERIOD}}. Knowledge is a feature.
Your monthly activity summary is in. Take a look — it takes 30 seconds.
{{TOTAL_SESSIONS}} sessions this month. {{TOTAL_TIME}} total play time. Here's the full picture.
Welcome back. Your limits are active and your dashboard is up to date.
Good to see you. Quick reminder: your deposit limit is set to {{LIMIT_AMOUNT}} this {{PERIOD}}.
You're back. Your tools are ready. Have fun.
Tough session. Your activity summary is in your dashboard if you want to review it.
Every session has a cost — that's how entertainment works. Your budget helps you manage it.
Want to talk it through? Free, confidential support: {{HELPLINE_NUMBER}}
Nice win. Quick reminder: the house edge is still the house edge. Enjoy the moment.
You're up. This is a great time to check your limits or call it a session.
Great session. Your activity summary has the full breakdown.
Your tools live here. Deposit limits, session reminders, activity summary — all in one place.
Manage your limits, review your activity, or update your preferences. Your account, your rules.
Welcome. Before you dive in, here are three things that take less than a minute and make everything better.
Step 1: Set your budget. Step 2: Set your pace. Step 3: Check your game IQ. That's it. You're ready.
New here? Start with the 60-second odds quiz. Most people get question 3 wrong.
Walking away while you're still enjoying yourself is a power move. See you next time.
Session over. Your activity summary is ready for review.
Thanks for playing. Your limits and tools are always here when you come back.

seasonalMessages.message: Big game coming up. Know the odds before you place the bet — here's how the lines actually work.
Bracket season is here. Before you fill yours out, here's what the math says about your chances.
The whole world is watching. Here's what you should know about betting on the beautiful game.
Big race day? Know your odds. A 10/1 shot means exactly what it says — here's the breakdown.
New year, same math. But here's a resolution that actually works: set your entertainment budget before you play.
Start the year with your limits set and your tools active. It takes 30 seconds.
This week is about knowing the facts, using the tools, and playing on your terms. Here's how to get started.
Free, confidential support is available 24/7. For any question about gambling. {{HELPLINE_NUMBER}}
This month, we're sharing the numbers behind the games. No scare tactics. Just facts you can use.
Your mental health matters more than any game. If gambling doesn't feel fun, it's okay to step back. {{HELPLINE_NUMBER}}
Holiday entertainment budget: set it before the fun starts. Your future self will thank you.
More time off means more time to play. Set a session reminder so you stay in control of your schedule.

regulatoryMessages.message: You must be {{MIN_AGE}}+ to gamble. It's the law — and it's here to protect you.
This platform is for players aged {{MIN_AGE}} and over. Age verification is required to play.
Gambling involves risk. Play on your terms — with your budget, your limits, and the facts.
Before you play, here's what you should know: the odds, the costs, and the tools available to you.
Free, confidential support is available 24/7 — for any question about gambling. {{HELPLINE_NUMBER}}
{{PROGRAM_NAME}} is operated by {{ORGANIZATION}} and licensed in {{JURISDICTION}}.
Gambling is regulated in your jurisdiction. For more information, visit {{REGULATOR_URL}}.
Promotional terms apply. Read the full T&Cs before opting in — we've made them readable.
